methods.description: This method ensures the accuracy of SEM-based forensic diatom testing by validating reagents, optimizing diatom treatment protocols, assessing method replicability, and optimizing cost and effort.

steps.description: All reagents and supportive materials need to be validated for diatom absence.
steps.searchable_summary: validate reagents for absence of diatoms

steps.description: Diatom treatment protocols should assure complete dissolution of organic matter while maintaining diatom frustule integrity.
steps.searchable_summary: digest tissue samples with HNO3 and H2O2

steps.description: Assess the replicability of the method's outcome.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate replicability of diatom concentration results

steps.description: Optimize the method's cost and effort without affecting diagnostic quality.
steps.searchable_summary: determine minimum number of images for representative data

methods.description: This method involves preparing samples for SEM analysis and acquiring images to assess diatom presence and abundance.

steps.description: Attach membranes to aluminum pin stubs with double-sided adhesive carbon tabs and sputter-coat with gold.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare samples for SEM by sputter-coating with gold

steps.description: Qualitatively examine peripheral tissues for diatom presence by classification.
steps.searchable_summary: classify diatom presence in peripheral tissues

steps.description: Quantitatively assess lung and water samples by manually scanning membranes at 1000× magnification.
steps.searchable_summary: quantitatively assess diatom abundance in samples

steps.description: Apply transectial and scatter image acquisition strategies to reduce imaging demand.
steps.searchable_summary: optimize image acquisition strategy for diatom count accuracy

methods.description: This method involves analyzing drowning media and lung tissue samples to calculate L/D ratios, indicating diatom concentration differences.

steps.description: Analyze peripheral tissue for diatom presence and calculate L/D ratios.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate L/D ratios from tissue and drowning media

methods.description: This method validates adapted processing conditions and performs L/D ratio calculations on selected autopsy cases.

steps.description: Select autopsy cases and process samples under established conditions.
steps.searchable_summary: validate processing conditions with autopsy cases
